text.title: Customer Support Ops Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Customer Support Ops.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, 65 tickets/month split free 60% / paid 35% / enterprise 5%.
example.trace: ticket audit (8 clusters) → FAQ (10 articles) → SLA (24/8/2h) → 12 canned replies covering 68% → weekly review booked
